hero.headline: 31 Years Keeping Sacramento Pools Perfect
hero.subheadline: Your pool should be your escape, not your weekend chore. Leisure Time Pool Service and Repair has been the Sacramento area's trusted family-owned pool company since 1995. Let our certified technicians handle the work so you can enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Maintenance to Remodel
services.subtitle: From weekly chemical balancing to full pool construction, our factory-trained team handles every aspect of pool ownership so you never have to worry.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Customizable maintenance plans with chemical balancing, skimming, brushing, and equipment checks. Your pool stays swim-ready every week, guaranteed.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Factory-trained technicians diagnose and repair pumps, filters, heaters, and salt systems for all major brands. Fast turnaround, honest pricing.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Transform your aging pool with new tile, plaster resurfacing, LED lighting, and modern water features. From concept to completion.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Repair
cards.description: Advanced leak detection technology pinpoints problems before they become expensive disasters. We find it and fix it, saving you water and money.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Repair
cards.description: Specialized portable and built-in spa repair by experienced technicians. All major brands serviced with quality parts and reliable workmanship.

cards.title: New Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom pool design and construction to create your dream backyard oasis. Waterfalls, energy-efficient pumps, solar heating, and safety covers included.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Pool

steps.title: Schedule a Free Assessment
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We'll send a certified technician to evaluate your pool, discuss your needs, and provide an honest quote with no pressure.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our chemically certified technicians and factory-trained installers arrive on schedule. Every service is thorough, documented, and backed by 31 years of expertise.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and perfectly balanced. We handle the chemistry, the equipment, and the upkeep so you can focus on making memories poolside.

about.label: Why Sacramento Trusts Us
about.headline: A Family Business That Treats Your Pool Like Our Own
about.description: Since 1995, the Leisure Time family has served Sacramento and surrounding communities with honest, dependable pool care. Our chemically certified technicians and factory-trained installers bring over three decades of hands-on experience to every job. We are not a franchise or a faceless corporation. We are your neighbors, and we take pride in every pool we touch.

features.title: Certified & Factory-Trained
features.description: Every technician is chemically certified and factory-trained on all major equipment brands. Your pool is in expert hands.

features.title: Customizable Service Plans
features.description: No two pools are the same. We tailor maintenance plans to your pool's specific needs, usage, and budget.

features.title: Financing Available
features.description: Major repairs or remodels should not break the bank. We offer financing through LightStream to make pool care affordable.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every plan is customized to your pool. We will assess your needs and give you an honest quote you can count on.

guarantee.headline: Our Family Promise to You
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will return to make it right at no extra charge. We have built our reputation on honesty and dependability for over 31 years, and we stand behind every job with our family name.

faqs.question: How soon can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within one week. For urgent repairs or equipment failures, we offer priority response. Call us at 916-638-4100 and we will work around your timeline.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. You can trust our team — as one client shared, our technician even secured an open gate and called to notify them.

faqs.question: What brands of equipment do you service?
faqs.answer: We service all major pool and spa equipment brands. Our technicians are factory-trained on the latest systems, from variable speed pumps and salt chlorine generators to heat pumps and automation controls.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for larger projects?
faqs.answer: Yes. For pool remodels, new construction, and major equipment upgrades, we offer financing through LightStream. We will help you find a payment plan that fits your budget.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Sacramento, Rancho Cordova, Citrus Heights, Gold River, Carmichael, Elk Grove, Folsom, Elkhorn, and surrounding communities. If you are in the greater Sacramento area, give us a call.

testimonials.name: John B.
testimonials.text: Thank you for the hard work, quick turnaround and flexibility. The pool looks fantastic and the pump repair looks brand new. Excellent work from a team that truly cares.

testimonials.name: Peter A.
testimonials.text: Excellent, dependable service with reasonable prices. Whenever we have had an issue, the response was immediate. I highly recommend Leisure Time for anyone who wants a worry-free pool.

testimonials.name: Alan P.
testimonials.text: We have been clients since 1997. The honesty about pool problems and equipment issues gives us total peace of mind. We never worry about our pool maintenance details.
